ddls:
CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the database was last modified */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the database */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the database is public */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Text field describing the access level */,
  "description_extended" TEXT /* Extended description of the database */,
  "size_gb" REAL /* Size of the database in gigabytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomies" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic classification */,
  "superkingdom" TEXT /* Superkingdom of the organism */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the organism */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the organism */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the organism */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the organism */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the organism */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxonomic classification */,
  "parent_tax_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxonomic classification */,
  "is_leaf" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the taxonomic classification is a leaf node */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the taxonomic classification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the sequence belongs to */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The genomic sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequence */,
  "is_consensus" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the sequence is a consensus sequence */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source */,
  "sequencing_technology" TEXT /* Technology used for sequencing */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was last modified */,
  "updater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* The annotation */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the annotation */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the annotation has been confirmed */,
  "confirmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who confirmed the annotation */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was last modified */,
  "updater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_annotations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_search" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being searched */,
  "query" TEXT /* The search query */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the search query */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search */,
  "search_time" REAL /* Time taken to perform the search */,
  "is_cached" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the search results were cached */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_search_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_search_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)
